description_long: This is a single slip-on shoe with a low-cut, rounded toe and a seamless upper. The exterior is predominantly white, adorned with a delicate floral pattern in shades of green, blue, and gray, giving it a fresh and stylish appearance. The sole is thick, white, and appears to be made of lightweight foam or rubber, providing comfort and support for walking. The shoe lacks any visible laces or fasteners, emphasizing its slip-on design for easy wear. The interior is likely lined with a soft fabric for comfort, and the overall construction suggests it is intended for casual, everyday use in urban environments. The shoe appears clean, undamaged, and in new condition.
description: A white slip-on shoe with a floral green and blue pattern, thick white sole, and no visible laces, designed for casual urban wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded toe and the floral pattern concentrated on the upper front.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the full floral pattern along the side and the smooth, thick white sole.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the heel area with the floral design wrapping around the back.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the floral pattern and the shoe's low profile.
